projects.name: GT Precision Website
bullets: Website/SEO review (6/23): #1-2 for 'precision sheet metal Tampa', named first in AI answers. GSC 231 clicks / 25.8K impressions (3mo). GBP 4.7 stars / 12 reviews, photos stale. Monthly auto-review live (1st).

Open for GH: upload 4 staged GBP photos, ask 2-3 customers for Google reviews (stuck at 12), claim Apple Business Connect + Bing Places. FabBridge end-to-end quote engine built; remaining = production wiring.
